previousBuildsNotForRelease.reason: The App Store signed IPA was missing signed iCloud/CloudKit app entitlements, so it must not be used for external beta or App Store review.

decision.nextGate: Confirm build 15 processing in App Store Connect, then attach it to internal and external TestFlight groups.

verificationCommands.purpose: Release file, entitlement, screenshot, metadata, privacy, public URL, upload log, and IPA checks.
App Store Connect build processing and TestFlight beta group linkage check when App Store Connect API credentials are available.
Live NEIS schoolInfo and mealServiceDietInfo smoke test without printing the API key.
Simulator XCTest suite for app behavior, CloudKit contracts, sample policy, intro assets, XP, sharing, and reset scopes.

externalBlockers.owner: Apple account holder or App Store Connect API key holder

externalBlockers.item: Attach build 15 to internal and external groups and submit external beta review
Deploy public database schema and queryable indexes listed in release/CloudKit/schema-contract.json
Enter final App Privacy answers from release/AppStoreMetadata/app-privacy-draft.md and confirm legal accuracy
Final Submit for Review legal/account confirmation

manualNextSteps: Run scripts/check-app-store-build-status.sh if App Store Connect API credentials are available locally.
For TestFlight group verification, run ASC_REQUIRE_BETA_GROUPS=1 ASC_EXPECTED_BETA_GROUP_NAME='패밀리' scripts/check-app-store-build-status.sh.
In App Store Connect, confirm build 15 finished processing.
Assign build 15 to the internal test group and the external group.
Confirm the public TestFlight link points at build 15.
Apply CloudKit public database schema, indexes, and permissions from release/CloudKit/schema-contract.json.
Review privacy/support/data-safety public pages before final App Review submission.
